name: Andhra Pradesh
description: Coastal temples, ancient stupas and the vibrant city of Visakhapatnam await curious travelers.

name: Arunachal Pradesh
description: Untouched Himalayan valleys, monasteries and tribal culture make this the land of dawn-lit mountains.

name: Assam
description: Sprawling tea gardens, the mighty Brahmaputra and one-horned rhinos define this northeastern gem.

name: Bihar
description: Birthplace of Buddhism, home to Bodh Gaya, Nalanda and centuries of spiritual heritage.

name: Chhattisgarh
description: Dense forests, thundering waterfalls and tribal traditions shape this central Indian state.

name: Goa
description: Golden beaches, vibrant nightlife and Portuguese heritage blend into India's favorite coastal getaway.

name: Gujarat
description: The Rann of Kutch, Gir's lions and vibrant festivals showcase Gujarat's rich culture.

name: Haryana
description: Ancient battlefields, Mughal gardens and modern cities sit side by side in Haryana.

name: Himachal Pradesh
description: Snow-capped peaks, charming hill stations and calm mountain trails invite every adventurer.

name: Jharkhand
description: Rolling hills, cascading waterfalls and rich mineral lands define this forested plateau state.

name: Karnataka
description: Royal palaces, tech hubs and Western Ghats forests come together in diverse Karnataka.

name: Kerala
description: Serene backwaters, lush greenery and spice-scented hills earn Kerala the title God's Own Country.

name: Madhya Pradesh
description: Tiger reserves, ancient temples and rock-cut caves sit at the heart of India.

name: Maharashtra
description: Home of Mumbai, beaches, forts and hill stations that mix urban energy with nature.

name: Manipur
description: Floating islands on Loktak Lake and graceful classical dance traditions define scenic Manipur.

name: Meghalaya
description: Living root bridges, misty hills and the wettest place on earth await in Meghalaya.

name: Mizoram
description: Rolling green hills, bamboo forests and warm hospitality mark this peaceful northeastern state.

name: Nagaland
description: Colorful tribal festivals, terraced hills and the famous Hornbill Festival showcase Naga heritage.

name: Odisha
description: Majestic temples, golden beaches and the ancient Sun Temple make Odisha truly memorable.

name: Punjab
description: The golden fields, vibrant culture and the sacred Golden Temple define spirited Punjab.

name: Rajasthan
description: Majestic forts, royal palaces and golden deserts capture the grandeur of Rajasthan.

name: Sikkim
description: Himalayan peaks, Buddhist monasteries and alpine lakes make Sikkim a tranquil mountain escape.

name: Tamil Nadu
description: Grand temples, classical arts and a long coastline showcase Tamil Nadu's timeless heritage.

name: Telangana
description: Historic Hyderabad, ancient forts and modern tech parks blend seamlessly across Telangana.

name: Tripura
description: Royal palaces, lakeside temples and lush hills reveal the quiet charm of Tripura.

name: Uttar Pradesh
description: Home to the Taj Mahal, sacred Varanasi and centuries of Mughal architectural splendor.

name: Uttarakhand
description: Sacred pilgrimage towns, Himalayan treks and serene valleys define the land of gods.

name: West Bengal
description: Colonial architecture, the Sundarbans mangroves and rich art define vibrant West Bengal.
